{"content":"# RPM Gauge Design Specification

## Concept & Vision
A classic motorcycle tachometer that feels alive and mechanical. The gauge should evoke the raw energy of a bike at rest - the needle dancing with the rhythm of a fictional engine, creating an almost meditative experience. Dark, industrial aesthetic with glowing accents that feel premium yet aggressive.

## Design Language

**Aesthetic Direction:** Dark industrial with neon accent lighting - inspired by cafe racer aesthetics and vintage analog gauges with modern LED illumination.

**Color Palette:**
- Background: #0a0a0f (near black)
- Gauge face: linear gradient from #1a1a2e to #16213e (dark blue-gray)
- Primary accent: #ff4d4d (warning red for redline zone)
- Secondary accent: #00ff88 (neon green for needle glow)
- Needle: #ff3366 (hot pink/red)
- Tick marks: #ffffff (white)
- Text: #e0e0e0 (light gray)
- Glow effects: rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.6)

**Typography:** 
- Numbers: Orbitron (futuristic digital feel)
- Labels: Inter (clean, readable)

**Motion Philosophy:**
- Needle movement: spring physics with overshoot and settle
- Fluctuations: perlin-noise-like smooth random changes, not jerky
- Idle around 1000-2000 RPM, capable of reaching 12000 RPM
- Subtle glow pulse on the needle tip

## Layout & Structure

Single circular gauge centered in viewport with:
- Outer bezel with metallic gradient
- Tick marks for RPM values (major every 1000, minor every 500)
- Red zone from 10000-12000 RPM
- Large center hub
- Digital RPM readout below the gauge
- Subtle ambient glow beneath the gauge

## Features & Interactions

- **Idle Fluctuation:** Needle naturally oscillates ±200-400 RPM around current position
- **Random Spikes:** Occasionally simulates engine revs (smooth ramp up, gradual settle)
- **Smooth Animation:** 60fps using requestAnimationFrame
- **Glow Effect:** Needle tip has animated glow that intensifies at higher RPMs

## Technical Approach

- Pure HTML/CSS/SVG/JavaScript (no frameworks)
- SVG for gauge graphics (scalable, crisp)
- CSS animations for glow effects
- JavaScript for:
  - Random value generation with smoothing
  - Needle rotation calculations
  - Animation loop management","path":"\\vanusdisk\Code\tester\admin\More_Chat\rpm_gauge_design.md"}

function.arguments:
{"content":"# RPM Gauge Design Specification

## Concept & Vision
A classic motorcycle tachometer that feels alive and mechanical. The gauge should evoke the raw energy of a bike at rest - the needle dancing with the rhythm of a fictional engine, creating an almost meditative experience. Dark, industrial aesthetic with glowing accents that feel premium yet aggressive.

## Design Language

**Aesthetic Direction:** Dark industrial with neon accent lighting - inspired by cafe racer aesthetics and vintage analog gauges with modern LED illumination.

**Color Palette:**
- Background: #0a0a0f (near black)
- Gauge face: linear gradient from #1a1a2e to #16213e (dark blue-gray)
- Primary accent: #ff4d4d (warning red for redline zone)
- Secondary accent: #00ff88 (neon green for needle glow)
- Needle: #ff3366 (hot pink/red)
- Tick marks: #ffffff (white)
- Text: #e0e0e0 (light gray)
- Glow effects: rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.6)

**Typography:** 
- Numbers: Orbitron (futuristic digital feel)
- Labels: Inter (clean, readable)

**Motion Philosophy:**
- Needle movement: spring physics with overshoot and settle
- Fluctuations: perlin-noise-like smooth random changes, not jerky
- Idle around 1000-2000 RPM, capable of reaching 12000 RPM
- Subtle glow pulse on the needle tip

## Layout & Structure

Single circular gauge centered in viewport with:
- Outer bezel with metallic gradient
- Tick marks for RPM values (major every 1000, minor every 500)
- Red zone from 10000-12000 RPM
- Large center hub
- Digital RPM readout below the gauge
- Subtle ambient glow beneath the gauge

## Features & Interactions

- **Idle Fluctuation:** Needle naturally oscillates ±200-400 RPM around current position
- **Random Spikes:** Occasionally simulates engine revs (smooth ramp up, gradual settle)
- **Smooth Animation:** 60fps using requestAnimationFrame
- **Glow Effect:** Needle tip has animated glow that intensifies at higher RPMs

## Technical Approach

- Pure HTML/CSS/SVG/JavaScript (no frameworks)
- SVG for gauge graphics (scalable, crisp)
- CSS animations for glow effects
- JavaScript for:
  - Random value generation with smoothing
  - Needle rotation calculations
  - Animation loop management","path":"\\vanusdisk\Code\tester\admin\More_Chat\rpm_gauge_design.md"}

function.arguments:
{"content":"# RPM Gauge Design Specification

## Concept & Vision
A classic motorcycle tachometer that feels alive and mechanical. The gauge should evoke the raw energy of a bike at rest - the needle dancing with the rhythm of a fictional engine, creating an almost meditative experience. Dark, industrial aesthetic with glowing accents that feel premium yet aggressive.

## Design Language

**Aesthetic Direction:** Dark industrial with neon accent lighting - inspired by cafe racer aesthetics and vintage analog gauges with modern LED illumination.

**Color Palette:**
- Background: #0a0a0f (near black)
- Gauge face: linear gradient from #1a1a2e to #16213e (dark blue-gray)
- Primary accent: #ff4d4d (warning red for redline zone)
- Secondary accent: #00ff88 (neon green for needle glow)
- Needle: #ff3366 (hot pink/red)
- Tick marks: #ffffff (white)
- Text: #e0e0e0 (light gray)
- Glow effects: rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.6)

**Typography:** 
- Numbers: Orbitron (futuristic digital feel)
- Labels: Inter (clean, readable)

**Motion Philosophy:**
- Needle movement: spring physics with overshoot and settle
- Fluctuations: perlin-noise-like smooth random changes, not jerky
- Idle around 1000-2000 RPM, capable of reaching 12000 RPM
- Subtle glow pulse on the needle tip

## Layout & Structure

Single circular gauge centered in viewport with:
- Outer bezel with metallic gradient
- Tick marks for RPM values (major every 1000, minor every 500)
- Red zone from 10000-12000 RPM
- Large center hub
- Digital RPM readout below the gauge
- Subtle ambient glow beneath the gauge

## Features & Interactions

- **Idle Fluctuation:** Needle naturally oscillates ±200-400 RPM around current position
- **Random Spikes:** Occasionally simulates engine revs (smooth ramp up, gradual settle)
- **Smooth Animation:** 60fps using requestAnimationFrame
- **Glow Effect:** Needle tip has animated glow that intensifies at higher RPMs

## Technical Approach

- Pure HTML/CSS/SVG/JavaScript (no frameworks)
- SVG for gauge graphics (scalable, crisp)
- CSS animations for glow effects
- JavaScript for:

    <script>
        // Gauge configuration
        const config = {
            minRPM: 0,
            maxRPM: 12,
            redlineRPM: 10,
            startAngle: 135,
            endAngle: 405,
            centerX: 210,
            centerY: 210,
            radius: 160
        };

        // State
        let currentRPM = 1.5; // Start at idle
        let targetRPM = 1.5;
        let lastUpdate = Date.now();

        // Perlin-like noise for smooth fluctuations
        class SimpleNoise {
            constructor() {
                this.offset = Math.random() * 1000;
                this.speed = 0.001;
            }
            
            get() {
                this.offset += this.speed;
                // Simple smoothed noise
                return Math.sin(this.offset) * 0.5 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 2.3) * 0.3 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 0.7) * 0.2;
            }
        }

        const noise = new SimpleNoise();

        // Calculate arc path for gauge background
        function describeArc(startAngle, endAngle, radius) {
            const start = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, endAngle);
            const end = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, startAngle);
            const largeArcFlag = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? "0" : "1";
            
            return [
                "M", start.x, start.y,
                "A", radius, radius, 0, largeArcFlag, 0, end.x, end.y
            ].join(" ");
        }

        function polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, radius, angleInDegrees) {
            const angleInRadians = (angleInDegrees - 90) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            return {
                x: centerX + (radius * Math.cos(angleInRadians)),
                y: centerY + (radius * Math.sin(angleInRadians))
            };
        }

        function angleToRPM(angle) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            const normalizedAngle = angle - config.startAngle;
            return (normalizedAngle / angleRange) * rpmRange + config.minRPM;
        }

        function rpmToAngle(rpm) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            return config.startAngle + ((rpm - config.minRPM) / rpmRange) * angleRange;
        }

        // Create tick marks
        function createTicks() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            for (let rpm = 0; rpm <= config.maxRPM; rpm += 0.5) {
                const angle = rpmToAngle(rpm);
                const isMajor = rpm % 1 === 0;
                const isRedline = rpm >= config.redlineRPM;
                
                const innerRadius = isMajor ? config.radius - 30 : config.radius - 20;
                const outerRadius = config.radius - 5;
                
                const inner = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, innerRadius, angle);
                const outer = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, outerRadius, angle);
                
                const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
                line.setAttribute("x1", inner.x);
                line.setAttribute("y1", inner.y);
                line.setAttribute("x2", outer.x);
                line.setAttribute("y2", outer.y);
                line.setAttribute("class", isRedline ? "redline-tick" : (isMajor ? "tick-major" : "tick-minor"));
                svg.appendChild(line);
                
                // Add labels for major ticks
                if (isMajor && rpm <= 10) {
                    const labelRadius = config.radius - 50;
                    const labelPos = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, labelRadius, angle);
                    
                    const text = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
                    text.setAttribute("x", labelPos.x);
                    text.setAttribute("y", labelPos.y);
                    text.setAttribute("class", "tick-label");
                    text.setAttribute("fill", isRedline ? "#ff4d4d" : "#e0e0e0");
                    text.textContent = rpm;
                    svg.appendChild(text);
                }
            }
        }

        // Create needle
        let needle;
        function createNeedle() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            needle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
            needle.setAttribute("class", "needle-glow");
            needle.setAttribute("filter", "url(#needleGlow)");
            
            // Main needle body
            const needlePath = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
            needlePath.setAttribute("d", "M210 210 L200 180 L210 60 L220 180 Z");
            needlePath.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(needlePath);
            
            // Center cap
            const cap = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
            cap.setAttribute("cx", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("cy", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("r", "12");
            cap.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(cap);
            
            svg.appendChild(needle);
        }

        // Update gauge
        function updateGauge() {
            // Random target changes
            if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
                const change = (Math.random() - 0.3) * 2;
                targetRPM = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(11, targetRPM + change));
            }
            
            // Add noise to target
            const noiseValue = noise.get() * 0.15;
            const effectiveTarget = targetRPM + noiseValue;
            
            // Smooth interpolation (spring-like)
            const diff = effectiveTarget - currentRPM;
            currentRPM += diff * 0.08;
            
            // Update needle rotation
            const angle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${angle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            // Update glow arc
            const glowArc = document.getElementById('glowArc');
            const currentAngle = config.startAngle + ((currentRPM / config.maxRPM) * (config.endAngle - config.startAngle));
            const arcEnd = Math.min(currentAngle, config.redlineRPM ? rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM) : config.endAngle);
            glowArc.setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, arcEnd, config.radius - 12));
            
            // Update digital display
            const displayRPM = Math.round(currentRPM * 1000);
            document.getElementById('rpmDisplay').textContent = displayRPM.toString().padStart(4, '0');
            
            // Adjust glow color based on RPM
            const glowColor = currentRPM >= config.redlineRPM ? 
                `rgba(255, 77, 77, ${0.3 + (currentRPM - config.redlineRPM) * 0.1})` :
                `rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)`;
            
            requestAnimationFrame(updateGauge);
        }

        // Initialize
        function init() {
            // Set up background arcs
            document.getElementById('bgArc').setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            const redlineAngle = rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM);
            document.getElementById('redzone').setAttribute("d", describeArc(redlineAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            createTicks();
            createNeedle();
            
            // Initial position
            const initialAngle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${initialAngle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            updateGauge();
        }

        init();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">

    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background: #0a0a0f;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #1a1a2e 0%, #0a0a0f 70%);
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .gauge-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 450px;
            height: 450px;
        }

        .gauge-bezel {
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #3a3a4a, #1a1a2a);
            box-shadow: 
                0 0 60px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.15),
                inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1),
                0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        }

        .gauge-face {
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            left: 15px;
            right: 15px;
            bottom: 15px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #0f0f1a 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .gauge-svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .digital-readout {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 10px 24px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .rpm-value {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        .rpm-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 10px;
            color: #888;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 2px;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
        }

        .glow-ring {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05); }
        }

        .needle-glow {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.9)) drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.5));
        }

        .center-hub {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .gear-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            margin-top: 75px;
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .gear-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 9px;
            color: #666;
            text-align: center;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .gear-indicators {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .gear-digit {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            background: rgba(30, 30, 40, 0.5);
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            border: 1px solid #222;
            min-width: 24px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .gear-digit.active {
            color: #00ff88;
            background: rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.15);
            border-color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3);
        }

        .center-hub svg {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
        }

        /* Tick mark styles */
        .tick-major {
            stroke: #ffffff;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
        .tick-minor {
            stroke: #888888;
            stroke-width: 1.5;
        }
        .tick-label {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            fill: #e0e0e0;
            text-anchor: middle;
        }
        .redline-tick {
            stroke: #ff4d4d;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="glow-ring"></div>
    <div class="gauge-container">
        <div class="gauge-bezel"></div>
        <div class="gauge-face">
            <!-- Digital readout - positioned behind needle -->
            <div class="digital-readout">
                <div class="rpm-value" id="rpmDisplay">0000</div>
                <div class="rpm-label">RPM × 1000</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="gear-display">
                <div class="gear-label">GEAR</div>
                <div class="gear-indicators" id="gearIndicators">
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="1">1</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="2">2</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="3">3</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="4">4</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="5">5</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="6">6</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <svg class="gauge-svg" viewBox="0 0 420 420" id="gauge">
                <!-- Red zone arc -->
                <path id="redzone" d="" fill="none" stroke="#ff4d4d" stroke-width="25" opacity="0.6"/>
                
                <!-- Background arc -->
                <path id="bgArc" d="" fill="none" stroke="#2a2a3a" stroke-width="25"/>
                
                <!-- Glow arc (underneath everything) -->
                <path id="glowArc" d="" fill="none" stroke="url(#glowGradient)" stroke-width="8" opacity="0.5"/>
                
                <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="glowGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
                        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#00ff88;stop-opacity:0"/>
                        <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#00ff88;stop-opacity:1"/>
                        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ff3366;stop-opacity:0"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                    <filter id="needleGlow">
                        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="coloredBlur"/>
                        <feMerge>
                            <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
                            <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
                        </feMerge>
                    </filter>
                    <linearGradient id="hubGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
                        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#4a4a5a"/>
                        <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#2a2a3a"/>
                        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1a1a2a"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                
                <!-- Tick marks and labels will be added via JS -->
            </svg>
            
            <!-- Center hub - sits above needle -->
            <div class="center-hub">
                <svg width="80" height="80" viewBox="0 0 80 80">
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="38" fill="url(#hubGradient)" stroke="#555" stroke-width="2"/>
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="28" fill="#1a1a2a" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1"/>
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="10" fill="#ff3366"/>
                </svg>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Gauge configuration
        const config = {
            minRPM: 0,
            maxRPM: 12,
            redlineRPM: 10,
            startAngle: 135,
            endAngle: 405,
            centerX: 210,
            centerY: 210,
            radius: 160
        };

        // State
        let currentRPM = 1.5; // Start at idle
        let targetRPM = 1.5;
        let lastUpdate = Date.now();

        // Perlin-like noise for smooth fluctuations
        class SimpleNoise {
            constructor() {
                this.offset = Math.random() * 1000;
                this.speed = 0.001;
            }
            
            get() {
                this.offset += this.speed;
                // Simple smoothed noise
                return Math.sin(this.offset) * 0.5 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 2.3) * 0.3 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 0.7) * 0.2;
            }
        }

        const noise = new SimpleNoise();

        // Calculate arc path for gauge background
        function describeArc(startAngle, endAngle, radius) {
            const start = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, endAngle);
            const end = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, startAngle);
            const largeArcFlag = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? "0" : "1";
            
            return [
                "M", start.x, start.y,
                "A", radius, radius, 0, largeArcFlag, 0, end.x, end.y
            ].join(" ");
        }

        function polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, radius, angleInDegrees) {
            const angleInRadians = (angleInDegrees - 90) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            return {
                x: centerX + (radius * Math.cos(angleInRadians)),
                y: centerY + (radius * Math.sin(angleInRadians))
            };
        }

        function angleToRPM(angle) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            const normalizedAngle = angle - config.startAngle;
            return (normalizedAngle / angleRange) * rpmRange + config.minRPM;
        }

        function rpmToAngle(rpm) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            return config.startAngle + ((rpm - config.minRPM) / rpmRange) * angleRange;
        }

        // Create tick marks
        function createTicks() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            for (let rpm = 0; rpm <= config.maxRPM; rpm += 0.5) {
                const angle = rpmToAngle(rpm);
                const isMajor = rpm % 1 === 0;
                const isRedline = rpm >= config.redlineRPM;
                
                const innerRadius = isMajor ? config.radius - 30 : config.radius - 20;
                const outerRadius = config.radius - 5;
                
                const inner = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, innerRadius, angle);
                const outer = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, outerRadius, angle);
                
                const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
                line.setAttribute("x1", inner.x);
                line.setAttribute("y1", inner.y);
                line.setAttribute("x2", outer.x);
                line.setAttribute("y2", outer.y);
                line.setAttribute("class", isRedline ? "redline-tick" : (isMajor ? "tick-major" : "tick-minor"));
                svg.appendChild(line);
                
                // Add labels for major ticks
                if (isMajor && rpm <= 10) {
                    const labelRadius = config.radius - 50;
                    const labelPos = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, labelRadius, angle);
                    
                    const text = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
                    text.setAttribute("x", labelPos.x);
                    text.setAttribute("y", labelPos.y);
                    text.setAttribute("class", "tick-label");
                    text.setAttribute("fill", isRedline ? "#ff4d4d" : "#e0e0e0");
                    text.textContent = rpm;
                    svg.appendChild(text);
                }
            }
        }

        // Create needle
        let needle;
        function createNeedle() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            needle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
            needle.setAttribute("class", "needle-glow");
            needle.setAttribute("filter", "url(#needleGlow)");
            
            // Main needle body
            const needlePath = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
            needlePath.setAttribute("d", "M210 210 L200 180 L210 60 L220 180 Z");
            needlePath.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(needlePath);
            
            // Center cap
            const cap = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
            cap.setAttribute("cx", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("cy", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("r", "12");
            cap.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(cap);
            
            svg.appendChild(needle);
        }

        // Update gauge
        function updateGauge() {
            // Random target changes
            if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
                const change = (Math.random() - 0.3) * 2;
                targetRPM = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(11, targetRPM + change));
            }
            
            // Add noise to target
            const noiseValue = noise.get() * 0.15;
            const effectiveTarget = targetRPM + noiseValue;
            
            // Smooth interpolation (spring-like)
            const diff = effectiveTarget - currentRPM;
            currentRPM += diff * 0.08;
            
            // Update needle rotation
            const angle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${angle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            // Update glow arc
            const glowArc = document.getElementById('glowArc');
            const currentAngle = config.startAngle + ((currentRPM / config.maxRPM) * (config.endAngle - config.startAngle));
            const arcEnd = Math.min(currentAngle, config.redlineRPM ? rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM) : config.endAngle);
            glowArc.setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, arcEnd, config.radius - 12));
            
            // Update digital display
            const displayRPM = Math.round(currentRPM * 1000);
            document.getElementById('rpmDisplay').textContent = displayRPM.toString().padStart(4, '0');
            
            // Adjust glow color based on RPM
            const glowColor = currentRPM >= config.redlineRPM ? 
                `rgba(255, 77, 77, ${0.3 + (currentRPM - config.redlineRPM) * 0.1})` :
                `rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)`;
            
            requestAnimationFrame(updateGauge);
        }

        // Initialize
        function init() {
            // Set up background arcs
            document.getElementById('bgArc').setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            const redlineAngle = rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM);
            document.getElementById('redzone').setAttribute("d", describeArc(redlineAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            createTicks();
            createNeedle();
            
            // Initial position
            const initialAngle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${initialAngle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            updateGauge();
        }

        init();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05); }
        }

        .needle-glow {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.9)) drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.5));
        }

        .center-hub {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .gear-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            margin-top: 75px;
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .gear-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 9px;
            color: #666;
            text-align: center;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .gear-indicators {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .gear-digit {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            background: rgba(30, 30, 40, 0.5);
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            border: 1px solid #222;
            min-width: 24px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .gear-digit.active {
            color: #00ff88;
            background: rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.15);
            border-color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3);
        }

        .center-hub svg {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
        }

        /* Tick mark styles */
        .tick-major {
            stroke: #ffffff;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
        .tick-minor {
            stroke: #888888;
            stroke-width: 1.5;
        }
        .tick-label {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            fill: #e0e0e0;
            text-anchor: middle;
        }
        .redline-tick {
            stroke: #ff4d4d;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="glow-ring"></div>
    <div class="gauge-container">
        <div class="gauge-bezel"></div>
        <div class="gauge-face">
            <!-- Digital readout - positioned behind needle -->
            <div class="digital-readout">
                <div class="rpm-value" id="rpmDisplay">0000</div>
                <div class="rpm-label">RPM × 1000</div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="gear-display">
                <div class="gear-label">GEAR</div>
                <div class="gear-indicators" id="gearIndicators">
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="1">1</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="2">2</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="3">3</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="4">4</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="5">5</div>
                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="6">6</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <svg class="gauge-svg" viewBox="0 0 420 420" id="gauge">
                <!-- Red zone arc -->
                <path id="redzone" d="" fill="none" stroke="#ff4d4d" stroke-width="25" opacity="0.6"/>
                
                <!-- Background arc -->
                <path id="bgArc" d="" fill="none" stroke="#2a2a3a" stroke-width="25"/>
                
                <!-- Glow arc (underneath everything) -->
                <path id="glowArc" d="" fill="none" stroke="url(#glowGradient)" stroke-width="8" opacity="0.5"/>
                
                <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="glowGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
                        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#00ff88;stop-opacity:0"/>
                        <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#00ff88;stop-opacity:1"/>
                        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ff3366;stop-opacity:0"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                    <filter id="needleGlow">
                        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="coloredBlur"/>
                        <feMerge>
                            <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
                            <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
                        </feMerge>
                    </filter>
                    <linearGradient id="hubGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
                        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#4a4a5a"/>
                        <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#2a2a3a"/>
                        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1a1a2a"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                
                <!-- Tick marks and labels will be added via JS -->
            </svg>
            
            <!-- Center hub - sits above needle -->
            <div class="center-hub">
                <svg width="80" height="80" viewBox="0 0 80 80">
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="38" fill="url(#hubGradient)" stroke="#555" stroke-width="2"/>
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="28" fill="#1a1a2a" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1"/>
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="10" fill="#ff3366"/>
                </svg>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Gauge configuration
        const config = {
            minRPM: 0,
            maxRPM: 12,
            redlineRPM: 10,
            startAngle: 135,
            endAngle: 405,
            centerX: 210,
            centerY: 210,
            radius: 160
        };

        // State
        let currentRPM = 1.5; // Start at idle
        let targetRPM = 1.5;
        let lastUpdate = Date.now();

        // Perlin-like noise for smooth fluctuations
        class SimpleNoise {
            constructor() {
                this.offset = Math.random() * 1000;
                this.speed = 0.001;
            }
            
            get() {
                this.offset += this.speed;
                // Simple smoothed noise
                return Math.sin(this.offset) * 0.5 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 2.3) * 0.3 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 0.7) * 0.2;
            }
        }

        const noise = new SimpleNoise();

        // Calculate arc path for gauge background
        function describeArc(startAngle, endAngle, radius) {
            const start = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, endAngle);
            const end = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, startAngle);
            const largeArcFlag = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? "0" : "1";
            
            return [
                "M", start.x, start.y,
                "A", radius, radius, 0, largeArcFlag, 0, end.x, end.y
            ].join(" ");
        }

        function polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, radius, angleInDegrees) {
            const angleInRadians = (angleInDegrees - 90) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            return {
                x: centerX + (radius * Math.cos(angleInRadians)),
                y: centerY + (radius * Math.sin(angleInRadians))
            };
        }

        function angleToRPM(angle) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            const normalizedAngle = angle - config.startAngle;
            return (normalizedAngle / angleRange) * rpmRange + config.minRPM;
        }

        function rpmToAngle(rpm) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            return config.startAngle + ((rpm - config.minRPM) / rpmRange) * angleRange;
        }

        // Create tick marks
        function createTicks() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            for (let rpm = 0; rpm <= config.maxRPM; rpm += 0.5) {
                const angle = rpmToAngle(rpm);
                const isMajor = rpm % 1 === 0;
                const isRedline = rpm >= config.redlineRPM;
                
                const innerRadius = isMajor ? config.radius - 30 : config.radius - 20;
                const outerRadius = config.radius - 5;
                
                const inner = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, innerRadius, angle);
                const outer = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, outerRadius, angle);
                
                const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
                line.setAttribute("x1", inner.x);
                line.setAttribute("y1", inner.y);
                line.setAttribute("x2", outer.x);
                line.setAttribute("y2", outer.y);
                line.setAttribute("class", isRedline ? "redline-tick" : (isMajor ? "tick-major" : "tick-minor"));
                svg.appendChild(line);
                
                // Add labels for major ticks
                if (isMajor && rpm <= 10) {
                    const labelRadius = config.radius - 50;
                    const labelPos = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, labelRadius, angle);
                    
                    const text = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
                    text.setAttribute("x", labelPos.x);
                    text.setAttribute("y", labelPos.y);
                    text.setAttribute("class", "tick-label");
                    text.setAttribute("fill", isRedline ? "#ff4d4d" : "#e0e0e0");
                    text.textContent = rpm;
                    svg.appendChild(text);
                }
            }
        }

        // Create needle
        let needle;
        function createNeedle() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            needle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
            needle.setAttribute("class", "needle-glow");
            needle.setAttribute("filter", "url(#needleGlow)");
            
            // Main needle body
            const needlePath = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
            needlePath.setAttribute("d", "M210 210 L200 180 L210 60 L220 180 Z");
            needlePath.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(needlePath);
            
            // Center cap
            const cap = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
            cap.setAttribute("cx", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("cy", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("r", "12");
            cap.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(cap);
            
            svg.appendChild(needle);
        }

        // Gear thresholds (RPM ranges for each gear)
        const gearThresholds = [
            { gear: 1, minRPM: 0, maxRPM: 2 },
            { gear: 2, minRPM: 2, maxRPM: 4 },
            { gear: 3, minRPM: 4, maxRPM: 6 },
            { gear: 4, minRPM: 6, maxRPM: 8 },
            { gear: 5, minRPM: 8, maxRPM: 10 },
            { gear: 6, minRPM: 10, maxRPM: 12 }
        ];

        // Update gear display based on RPM
        function updateGearDisplay(rpm) {
            const indicators = document.querySelectorAll('.gear-digit');
            
            // Determine current gear
            let currentGear = 1;
            for (const threshold of gearThresholds) {
                if (rpm >= threshold.minRPM && rpm < threshold.maxRPM) {
                    currentGear = threshold.gear;
                    break;
                }
                if (rpm >= threshold.maxRPM) {
                    currentGear = threshold.gear;
                }
            }
            
            // Update active state
            indicators.forEach(indicator => {
                const gearNum = parseInt(indicator.getAttribute('data-gear'));
                if (gearNum === currentGear) {
                    indicator.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                    indicator.classList.remove('active');
                }
            });
        }

        // Update gauge
        function updateGauge() {
            // Random target changes
            if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
                const change = (Math.random() - 0.3) * 2;
                targetRPM = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(11, targetRPM + change));
            }
            
            // Add noise to target
            const noiseValue = noise.get() * 0.15;
            const effectiveTarget = targetRPM + noiseValue;
            
            // Smooth interpolation (spring-like)
            const diff = effectiveTarget - currentRPM;
            currentRPM += diff * 0.08;
            
            // Update needle rotation
            const angle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${angle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            // Update glow arc
            const glowArc = document.getElementById('glowArc');
            const currentAngle = config.startAngle + ((currentRPM / config.maxRPM) * (config.endAngle - config.startAngle));
            const arcEnd = Math.min(currentAngle, config.redlineRPM ? rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM) : config.endAngle);
            glowArc.setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, arcEnd, config.radius - 12));
            
            // Update digital display
            const displayRPM = Math.round(currentRPM * 1000);
            document.getElementById('rpmDisplay').textContent = displayRPM.toString().padStart(4, '0');
            
            // Update gear display
            updateGearDisplay(currentRPM);
            
            // Adjust glow color based on RPM
            const glowColor = currentRPM >= config.redlineRPM ? 
                `rgba(255, 77, 77, ${0.3 + (currentRPM - config.redlineRPM) * 0.1})` :
                `rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)`;
            
            requestAnimationFrame(updateGauge);
        }

        // Initialize
        function init() {
            // Set up background arcs
            document.getElementById('bgArc').setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            const redlineAngle = rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM);
            document.getElementById('redzone').setAttribute("d", describeArc(redlineAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            createTicks();
            createNeedle();
            
            // Initial position
            const initialAngle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${initialAngle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            updateGauge();
        }

        init();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">

    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background: #0a0a0f;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #1a1a2e 0%, #0a0a0f 70%);
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .gauge-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 450px;
            height: 450px;
        }

        .gauge-bezel {
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, #3a3a4a, #1a1a2a);
            box-shadow: 
                0 0 60px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.15),
                inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1),
                0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        }

        .gauge-face {
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            left: 15px;
            right: 15px;
            bottom: 15px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #0f0f1a 100%);
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .gauge-svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .digital-readout {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 10px 24px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .rpm-value {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        .rpm-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 10px;
            color: #888;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 2px;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
        }

        .glow-ring {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05); }
        }

        .needle-glow {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.9)) drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.5));
        }

        .center-hub {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .gear-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            margin-top: 75px;
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .gear-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 9px;
            color: #666;
            text-align: center;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .gear-indicators {
            display: flex;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .gear-digit {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            background: rgba(30, 30, 40, 0.5);
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            border: 1px solid #222;
            min-width: 24px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .gear-digit.active {
            color: #00ff88;
            background: rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.15);
            border-color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3);
        }

        .center-hub svg {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
        }

        /* Tick mark styles */
        .tick-major {
            stroke: #ffffff;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
        .tick-minor {
            stroke: #888888;
            stroke-width: 1.5;
        }
        .tick-label {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            fill: #e0e0e0;
            text-anchor: middle;
        }
        .redline-tick {
            stroke: #ff4d4d;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
    </style>
</head>

function.arguments:
{"content":"# RPM Gauge Design Specification

## Concept & Vision
A classic motorcycle tachometer that feels alive and mechanical. The gauge should evoke the raw energy of a bike at rest - the needle dancing with the rhythm of a fictional engine, creating an almost meditative experience. Dark, industrial aesthetic with glowing accents that feel premium yet aggressive.

## Design Language

**Aesthetic Direction:** Dark industrial with neon accent lighting - inspired by cafe racer aesthetics and vintage analog gauges with modern LED illumination.

**Color Palette:**
- Background: #0a0a0f (near black)
- Gauge face: linear gradient from #1a1a2e to #16213e (dark blue-gray)
- Primary accent: #ff4d4d (warning red for redline zone)
- Secondary accent: #00ff88 (neon green for needle glow)
- Needle: #ff3366 (hot pink/red)
- Tick marks: #ffffff (white)
- Text: #e0e0e0 (light gray)
- Glow effects: rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.6)

**Typography:** 
- Numbers: Orbitron (futuristic digital feel)
- Labels: Inter (clean, readable)

**Motion Philosophy:**
- Needle movement: spring physics with overshoot and settle
- Fluctuations: perlin-noise-like smooth random changes, not jerky
- Idle around 1000-2000 RPM, capable of reaching 12000 RPM
- Subtle glow pulse on the needle tip

## Layout & Structure

Single circular gauge centered in viewport with:
- Outer bezel with metallic gradient
- Tick marks for RPM values (major every 1000, minor every 500)
- Red zone from 10000-12000 RPM
- Large center hub
- Digital RPM readout below the gauge
- Subtle ambient glow beneath the gauge

## Features & Interactions

- **Idle Fluctuation:** Needle naturally oscillates ±200-400 RPM around current position
- **Random Spikes:** Occasionally simulates engine revs (smooth ramp up, gradual settle)
- **Smooth Animation:** 60fps using requestAnimationFrame
- **Glow Effect:** Needle tip has animated glow that intensifies at higher RPMs

## Technical Approach

- Pure HTML/CSS/SVG/JavaScript (no frameworks)
- SVG for gauge graphics (scalable, crisp)
- CSS animations for glow effects
- JavaScript for:
  - Random value generation with smoothing
  - Needle rotation calculations
  - Animation loop management","path":"\\vanusdisk\Code\tester\admin\More_Chat\rpm_gauge_design.md"}

```svg
<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="350" height="350" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <!-- Metallic bezel gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="bezelGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#4a4a5a"/>
      <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#2a2a3a"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1a1a2a"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Face gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="faceGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#252530"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#0f0f1a"/>
    </radialGradient>
    
    <!-- Green glow for safe zone -->
    <filter id="greenGlow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="coloredBlur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
    
    <!-- Red zone glow -->
    <filter id="redGlow">
```

            height: 100%;
        }

        .digital-readout {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 80px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            background: #0a0a0f;
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 2px solid #333;
            box-shadow: inset 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
        }

        .rpm-value {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 32px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        .rpm-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #888;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 4px;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
        }

        .glow-ring {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05); }
        }

        .needle-glow {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.9)) drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.5));
        }

        /* Tick mark styles */
        .tick-major {
            stroke: #ffffff;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
        .tick-minor {
            stroke: #888888;
            stroke-width: 1.5;
        }
        .tick-label {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 18px;
            fill: #e0e0e0;
            text-anchor: middle;
        }
        .redline-tick {
            stroke: #ff4d4d;
            stroke-width: 3;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="glow-ring"></div>
    <div class="gauge-container">
        <div class="gauge-bezel"></div>
        <div class="gauge-face">
            <svg class="gauge-svg" viewBox="0 0 420 420" id="gauge">
                <!-- Red zone arc -->
                <path id="redzone" d="" fill="none" stroke="#ff4d4d" stroke-width="25" opacity="0.6"/>
                
                <!-- Background arc -->
                <path id="bgArc" d="" fill="none" stroke="#2a2a3a" stroke-width="25"/>
                
                <!-- Glow arc (underneath everything) -->
                <path id="glowArc" d="" fill="none" stroke="url(#glowGradient)" stroke-width="8" opacity="0.5"/>
                
                <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="glowGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
                        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#00ff88;stop-opacity:0"/>
                        <stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#00ff88;stop-opacity:1"/>
                        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ff3366;stop-opacity:0"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                    <filter id="needleGlow">
                        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="coloredBlur"/>
                        <feMerge>
                            <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
                            <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
                        </feMerge>
                    </filter>
                </defs>
                
                <!-- Tick marks and labels will be added via JS -->
            </svg>
            
            <!-- Center hub -->
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);">
                <svg width="80" height="80" viewBox="0 0 80 80">
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="38" fill="linear-gradient(145deg, #2a2a3a, #1a1a2a)" stroke="#444" stroke-width="2"/>
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="25" fill="#1a1a2a" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1"/>
                    <circle cx="40" cy="40" r="8" fill="#ff3366"/>
                </svg>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="digital-readout">
            <div class="rpm-value" id="rpmDisplay">0000</div>
            <div class="rpm-label">RPM × 1000</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Gauge configuration
        const config = {
            minRPM: 0,
            maxRPM: 12,
            redlineRPM: 10,
            startAngle: 135,
            endAngle: 405,
            centerX: 210,
            centerY: 210,
            radius: 160
        };

        // State
        let currentRPM = 1.5; // Start at idle
        let targetRPM = 1.5;
        let lastUpdate = Date.now();

        // Perlin-like noise for smooth fluctuations
        class SimpleNoise {
            constructor() {
                this.offset = Math.random() * 1000;
                this.speed = 0.001;
            }
            
            get() {
                this.offset += this.speed;
                // Simple smoothed noise
                return Math.sin(this.offset) * 0.5 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 2.3) * 0.3 + 
                       Math.sin(this.offset * 0.7) * 0.2;
            }
        }

        const noise = new SimpleNoise();

        // Calculate arc path for gauge background
        function describeArc(startAngle, endAngle, radius) {
            const start = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, endAngle);
            const end = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, radius, startAngle);
            const largeArcFlag = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? "0" : "1";
            
            return [
                "M", start.x, start.y,
                "A", radius, radius, 0, largeArcFlag, 0, end.x, end.y
            ].join(" ");
        }

        function polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, radius, angleInDegrees) {
            const angleInRadians = (angleInDegrees - 90) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            return {
                x: centerX + (radius * Math.cos(angleInRadians)),
                y: centerY + (radius * Math.sin(angleInRadians))
            };
        }

        function angleToRPM(angle) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            const normalizedAngle = angle - config.startAngle;
            return (normalizedAngle / angleRange) * rpmRange + config.minRPM;
        }

        function rpmToAngle(rpm) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            return config.startAngle + ((rpm - config.minRPM) / rpmRange) * angleRange;
        }

        // Create tick marks
        function createTicks() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            for (let rpm = 0; rpm <= config.maxRPM; rpm += 0.5) {
                const angle = rpmToAngle(rpm);
                const isMajor = rpm % 1 === 0;
                const isRedline = rpm >= config.redlineRPM;
                
                const innerRadius = isMajor ? config.radius - 30 : config.radius - 20;
                const outerRadius = config.radius - 5;
                
                const inner = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, innerRadius, angle);
                const outer = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, outerRadius, angle);
                
                const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
                line.setAttribute("x1", inner.x);
                line.setAttribute("y1", inner.y);
                line.setAttribute("x2", outer.x);
                line.setAttribute("y2", outer.y);
                line.setAttribute("class", isRedline ? "redline-tick" : (isMajor ? "tick-major" : "tick-minor"));
                svg.appendChild(line);
                
                // Add labels for major ticks
                if (isMajor && rpm <= 10) {
                    const labelRadius = config.radius - 50;
                    const labelPos = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, labelRadius, angle);
                    
                    const text = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
                    text.setAttribute("x", labelPos.x);
                    text.setAttribute("y", labelPos.y);
                    text.setAttribute("class", "tick-label");
                    text.setAttribute("fill", isRedline ? "#ff4d4d" : "#e0e0e0");
                    text.textContent = rpm;
                    svg.appendChild(text);
                }
            }
        }

        // Create needle
        let needle;
        function createNeedle() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            needle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
            needle.setAttribute("class", "needle-glow");
            needle.setAttribute("filter", "url(#needleGlow)");
            
            // Main needle body
            const needlePath = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
            needlePath.setAttribute("d", "M210 210 L200 180 L210 60 L220 180 Z");
            needlePath.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(needlePath);
            
            // Center cap
            const cap = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
            cap.setAttribute("cx", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("cy", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("r", "12");
            cap.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(cap);
            
            svg.appendChild(needle);
        }

        // Update gauge
        function updateGauge() {
            // Random target changes
            if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
                const change = (Math.random() - 0.3) * 2;
                targetRPM = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(11, targetRPM + change));
            }
            
            // Add noise to target
            const noiseValue = noise.get() * 0.15;
            const effectiveTarget = targetRPM + noiseValue;
            
            // Smooth interpolation (spring-like)
            const diff = effectiveTarget - currentRPM;
            currentRPM += diff * 0.08;
            
            // Update needle rotation
            const angle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${angle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            // Update glow arc
            const glowArc = document.getElementById('glowArc');
            const currentAngle = config.startAngle + ((currentRPM / config.maxRPM) * (config.endAngle - config.startAngle));
            const arcEnd = Math.min(currentAngle, config.redlineRPM ? rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM) : config.endAngle);
            glowArc.setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, arcEnd, config.radius - 12));
            
            // Update digital display
            const displayRPM = Math.round(currentRPM * 1000);
            document.getElementById('rpmDisplay').textContent = displayRPM.toString().padStart(4, '0');
            
            // Adjust glow color based on RPM
            const glowColor = currentRPM >= config.redlineRPM ? 
                `rgba(255, 77, 77, ${0.3 + (currentRPM - config.redlineRPM) * 0.1})` :
                `rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)`;
            
            requestAnimationFrame(updateGauge);
        }

        // Initialize
        function init() {
            // Set up background arcs
            document.getElementById('bgArc').setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            const redlineAngle = rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM);
            document.getElementById('redzone').setAttribute("d", describeArc(redlineAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            createTicks();
            createNeedle();
            
            // Initial position
            const initialAngle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${initialAngle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            updateGauge();
        }

        init();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

            <div class="digital-readout">

                <div class="rpm-label">RPM × 1000</div>

                    <div class="gear-digit" data-gear="4">4</div>

            </div>
            
            <svg class="gauge-svg" viewBox="0 0 420 420" id="gauge">

        };

        class SimpleNoise {
            constructor() {
                this.offset = Math.random() * 1000;
                this.speed = 0.001;
            }
            
            get() {
                this.offset += this.speed;
                // Simple smoothed noise
                return Math.sin(this.offset) * 0.5 +

                       Math.sin(this.offset * 0.7) * 0.2;

            const largeArcFlag = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? "0" : "1";
            
            return [
                "M", start.x, start.y,
                "A", radius, radius, 0, largeArcFlag, 0, end.x, end.y
            ].join(" ");
        }

        function polarToCartesian(centerX, centerY, radius, angleInDegrees) {
            const angleInRadians = (angleInDegrees - 90) * Math.PI / 180.0;
            return {
                x: centerX + (radius * Math.cos(angleInRadians)),
                y: centerY + (radius * Math.sin(angleInRadians))
            };
        }

        function angleToRPM(angle) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            const normalizedAngle = angle - config.startAngle;
            return (normalizedAngle / angleRange) * rpmRange + config.minRPM;
        }

        function rpmToAngle(rpm) {
            const angleRange = config.endAngle - config.startAngle;
            const rpmRange = config.maxRPM - config.minRPM;
            return config.startAngle + ((rpm - config.minRPM) / rpmRange) * angleRange;
        }

        // Create tick marks
        function createTicks() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            for (let rpm = 0; rpm <= config.maxRPM; rpm += 0.5) {
                const angle = rpmToAngle(rpm);
                const isMajor = rpm % 1 === 0;
                const isRedline = rpm >= config.redlineRPM;
                
                const innerRadius = isMajor ? config.radius - 30 : config.radius - 20;
                const outerRadius = config.radius - 5;
                
                const inner = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, innerRadius, angle);
                const outer = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, outerRadius, angle);
                
                const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
                line.setAttribute("x1", inner.x);
                line.setAttribute("y1", inner.y);
                line.setAttribute("x2", outer.x);
                line.setAttribute("y2", outer.y);
                line.setAttribute("class", isRedline ? "redline-tick" : (isMajor ? "tick-major" : "tick-minor"));
                svg.appendChild(line);
                
                // Add labels for major ticks
                if (isMajor && rpm <= 10) {
                    const labelRadius = config.radius - 50;
                    const labelPos = polarToCartesian(config.centerX, config.centerY, labelRadius, angle);
                    
                    const text = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
                    text.setAttribute("x", labelPos.x);
                    text.setAttribute("y", labelPos.y);
                    text.setAttribute("class", "tick-label");
                    text.setAttribute("fill", isRedline ? "#ff4d4d" : "#e0e0e0");
                    text.textContent = rpm;
                    svg.appendChild(text);
                }
            }
        }

        // Create needle
        let needle;
        function createNeedle() {
            const svg = document.getElementById('gauge');
            
            needle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
            needle.setAttribute("class", "needle-glow");
            needle.setAttribute("filter", "url(#needleGlow)");
            
            // Main needle body
            const needlePath = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
            needlePath.setAttribute("d", "M210 210 L200 180 L210 60 L220 180 Z");
            needlePath.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(needlePath);
            
            // Center cap
            const cap = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
            cap.setAttribute("cx", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("cy", "210");
            cap.setAttribute("r", "12");
            cap.setAttribute("fill", "#ff3366");
            needle.appendChild(cap);
            
            svg.appendChild(needle);
        }

        // Update gauge
        function updateGauge() {
            // Random target changes
            if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
                const change = (Math.random() - 0.3) * 2;
                targetRPM = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(11, targetRPM + change));
            }
            
            // Add noise to target
            const noiseValue = noise.get() * 0.15;
            const effectiveTarget = targetRPM + noiseValue;
            
            // Smooth interpolation (spring-like)
            const diff = effectiveTarget - currentRPM;
            currentRPM += diff * 0.08;
            
            // Update needle rotation
            const angle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${angle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            // Update glow arc
            const glowArc = document.getElementById('glowArc');
            const currentAngle = config.startAngle + ((currentRPM / config.maxRPM) * (config.endAngle - config.startAngle));
            const arcEnd = Math.min(currentAngle, config.redlineRPM ? rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM) : config.endAngle);
            glowArc.setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, arcEnd, config.radius - 12));
            
            // Update digital display
            const displayRPM = Math.round(currentRPM * 1000);
            document.getElementById('rpmDisplay').textContent = displayRPM.toString().padStart(4, '0');
            
            // Adjust glow color based on RPM
            const glowColor = currentRPM >= config.redlineRPM ? 
                `rgba(255, 77, 77, ${0.3 + (currentRPM - config.redlineRPM) * 0.1})` :
                `rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)`;
            
            requestAnimationFrame(updateGauge);
        }

        // Initialize
        function init() {
            // Set up background arcs
            document.getElementById('bgArc').setAttribute("d", describeArc(config.startAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            const redlineAngle = rpmToAngle(config.redlineRPM);
            document.getElementById('redzone').setAttribute("d", describeArc(redlineAngle, config.endAngle, config.radius));
            
            createTicks();
            createNeedle();
            
            // Initial position
            const initialAngle = rpmToAngle(currentRPM);
            needle.setAttribute("transform", `rotate(${initialAngle}, 210, 210)`);
            
            updateGauge();
        }

        init();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;

            z-index: 5;

            position: absolute;

            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 10px 24px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .rpm-value {
            font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00ff88;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.8);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        .rpm-label {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 10px;
            color: #888;
            text-align: center;
            margin-top: 2px;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
        }

        .glow-ring {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
            50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.05); }
        }

        .needle-glow {
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.9)) drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(255, 51, 102, 0.5));
        }

        .center-hub {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .gear-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: auto;
            right: 15px;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            margin-top: 75px;
            background: rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.85);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #333;
            box-shadow: 
                inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8),
                0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1);
            z-index: 2;
